cc <@763914540378226719> and <@412614104222531604> 

reorg payload is probably the "easiest" to do. do you guys have ideas for the other two? 

for checkpoint sync when slot 0 is missed of an epoch, we might need to use assertoor to see who the proposer of slot 0 is, then disable their json-snooper so it definitely misses. then we have to checkpoint sync a new node to this chain. 

range sync one, this is just causing reorgs and using syncoor/script right?

author: barnabasbusa
content: so checkpointz won't serve the state for epochs where slot 0 is missing

author: barnabasbusa
content: so you asking to do checkpoint sync off of a beacon node instead ?

author: potuz
